summary.lv: X Infotech meklē DevOps inženieru, kurš plānos un ieviesīs DevOps pieeju, izstrādās CI/CD risinājumus un nodrošinās drošu, stabilu programmatūras piegādi.
summary.en: X Infotech seeks a DevOps Engineer to plan and implement DevOps practices, design CI/CD pipelines, and ensure reliable and secure software delivery for digital identity and financial solutions.
